text.title: Build vs Buy Decision Tree Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid decision-record artefact for decision-tree-build-vs-buy. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner plural; choice not in enum; scoring missing axes; reversibility too lenient.

forbidden.pattern: `reversibility == two_way_door` — build-vs-buy is almost never two-way.
`scoring` missing one of strategic_differentiation / tco_3yr / time_to_value / lock_in_risk.
